title: festuca paniculata var. baetica
intro: Festuca paniculata var. baetica, also known as Baetic fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Spanish medicine. The plant's properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Festuca paniculata var. baetica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its soothing and calming effects.
